data.title: Solstice Minerals Sees Change in Substantial Shareholding
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Solstice Minerals Limited ( (AU:SLS) ).

Solstice Minerals Limited has announced a change in the substantial holding of its shares by Treasury Services Group Pty Ltd, acting on behalf of the Nero Resource Fund. The fund’s voting power in Solstice Minerals has decreased from 8.51% to 6.39%, indicating a reduction in their stake. This change in shareholding could impact the company’s market dynamics and influence its strategic decisions, affecting stakeholders’ interests.

More about Solstice Minerals Limited

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Greatview Aseptic Packaging Faces Further Delays in Annual Results Publication
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) is now available.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited has announced a further delay in the publication of its 2024 Annual Results, the postponement of its Board meeting, and the delay in dispatching the 2024 Annual Report due to an incomplete investigation by Grant Thornton Advisory. The company is working closely with its auditors to resolve outstanding issues and aims to publish the results by July 31, 2025. Trading in the company’s shares remains suspended since February 19, 2025, until further notice, impacting stakeholders and market confidence.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited operates in the packaging industry, specializing in aseptic packaging solutions. The company focuses on providing packaging services and products that cater to the food and beverage industry, ensuring product safety and extending shelf life.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$3.52B

Find detailed analytics on 0468 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Borregaard ASA Announces Leadership Changes in BioSolutions Division
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Borregaard ASA ( (GB:0QB7) ) has provided an update.

Borregaard ASA has announced the appointment of Knut-Harald Bakke as the new Executive Vice President of BioSolutions, effective August 1, 2025. Bakke, who currently serves as Director of Investor Relations, will also join the Group Executive Management. This leadership change is part of a broader transition as Tom Erik Foss-Jacobsen steps into the CEO role. The company will begin searching for a new Director of Investor Relations, with CFO Per Bjarne Lyngstad temporarily assuming the role. These changes are expected to impact Borregaard’s strategic direction and operational focus in the bio-based solutions sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0QB7) stock is a Buy with a NOK210.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Borregaard ASA stock, see the GB:0QB7 Stock Forecast page.

More about Borregaard ASA

Borregaard ASA operates in the bio-based solutions industry, focusing on the development and production of sustainable biochemicals and biomaterials. The company is known for its innovative approach to utilizing natural raw materials to create products that serve various markets, including agriculture, construction, and pharmaceuticals.

Average Trading Volume: 81,732

Current Market Cap: NOK19B

  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Metrics Master Income Trust ( (AU:MXT) ) has shared an update.

The Metrics Master Income Trust announced an unaudited Net Tangible Asset Backing (NTA) per share of $2.0050 as of June 12, 2025. This update reflects the trust’s ongoing strategy to deliver target returns while preserving investor capital through active management in the corporate loan market. The announcement is significant for stakeholders as it provides insight into the trust’s financial health and its ability to meet investment objectives.

More about Metrics Master Income Trust

Metrics Master Income Trust operates in the financial services industry, focusing on providing monthly cash income, low risk of capital loss, and portfolio diversification through actively managed loan portfolios. The trust participates in Australia’s corporate loan market, which is predominantly bank-dominated. It is managed by The Trust Company (RE Services) Limited, part of the Perpetual group, known for its funds management, financial advisory, and trustee services.
